title: Python Backend Developer (m/w/d)
description:
Demo posting — sample data, not a real vacancy.

We are looking for a backend developer to help build the API behind our product. You will work in a small team that values tested, maintainable code.

  • Design and build REST APIs with FastAPI
  • Model data in PostgreSQL with SQLAlchemy
  • Write tests with pytest and keep CI green

Home office friendly. German B2 and English required.

title: Backend Engineer – Medical Imaging
description:
Demo posting — sample data, not a real vacancy.

  • Build services that turn raw scans into structured results
  • Collaborate with clinicians and data scientists
